summary: Tested refactored WorkspaceChatPanel/WorkspaceCodeEditor components, War Room sound toggle, and end-to-end COMMANDER pipeline routing. Fixed critical messages limit bug. All 27 backend tests pass.

minor.issue: Default limit=100 returns OLDEST 100 messages (ASC sort), hiding latest pipeline responses when project has >100 messages. FIXED in frontend by using limit=500

ui_bugs.issue: Messages were hidden when project exceeded 100 messages - fixed by changing axios.get to use limit=500

integration_issues.issue: Auto-delegation runs correctly in live sessions. When browser session is interrupted (test timeout), delegation cards show Execute buttons (by design). Full 11-agent pipeline takes 5-11 min and couldn't be fully verified in automated test due to session lifetime limits.

issues: File tree is 5+ levels deep (AbyssalShores/Source/AbyssalShores/Player/CppClasses/file.h) requiring many clicks to navigate - consider auto-expanding or showing flat list

action_items: Consider increasing messages limit in backend or using DESC sort with limit (currently ASC first-100 hides latest messages for projects with >100 msgs - FIXED frontend with limit=500 but backend should also support DESC ordering)
Dead code cleanup: renderFileTree function in ProjectWorkspace.jsx (lines 841-845) is unused after WorkspaceCodeEditor extraction
Add data-testid to streaming indicator in WorkspaceChatPanel for better testability (added sound-toggle-btn to WarRoomPanel)
Previous pipeline runs (01:49-01:52) show COMMANDER giving brief task descriptions ('Brief game design note') - verify COMMANDER always gives detailed tasks for game prompts
Full pipeline quality test (11 agents): FORGE/ATLAS/NEXUS responses need manual verification - run Execute buttons in project 878a623f-111e-45df-a837-7821bace9c1a for the 10 pending delegations
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: ProjectWorkspace.jsx line 243 fetched messages with default limit=100 (ascending). For projects with >100 messages, latest pipeline responses were invisible to users. Fixed to limit=500.
Dead code: renderFileTree() at line 841 in ProjectWorkspace.jsx is now duplicated by WorkspaceCodeEditor.jsx renderTree(). Should be removed.
Auto-delegation chain (lines 454-460) is sequential (one agent at a time). 11 agents × 30-60s = 5.5-11 min per pipeline. Consider parallel delegation for non-dependent agents.
WarRoomPanel.jsx sound toggle button was missing data-testid - added 'sound-toggle-btn'
WorkspaceChatPanel and WorkspaceCodeEditor extraction is clean - proper prop interface, pure presentation components, all state remains in ProjectWorkspace

success_rate.frontend: 85% (core UI works; full pipeline auto-execution not verified due to 11-min runtime)

seed_data_creation: Combat system message sent to project 878a623f-111e-45df-a837-7821bace9c1a. 10 delegation cards pending (NEXUS, ATLAS, FORGE, TERRA, PRISM, KINETIC, SONIC, VERTEX, CHRONICLE, SENTINEL). Click Execute on each to run manually.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project 878a623f has 110+ messages. Messages limit was fixed to 500. WorkspaceChatPanel/WorkspaceCodeEditor render correctly. War Room shows all 12 agents with sound toggle. COMMANDER routing produces detailed 10-agent delegation plan (verified via DB). 10 delegation cards visible in chat with Execute buttons for manual run. Sounds uses Web Audio API with lazy AudioContext. Auto-delegation requires live browser session (5-11 min). Backend all 27 tests pass.

pipeline_quality_observations.my_test_pipeline_02:00: COMMANDER produced detailed 1000+ word delegation tasks for all 10 agents (NEXUS, ATLAS, FORGE, TERRA, PRISM, KINETIC, SONIC, VERTEX, CHRONICLE, SENTINEL). Quality is excellent.
pipeline_quality_observations.previous_pipeline_01:49: COMMANDER gave brief task descriptions ('Brief game design note', 'Brief VFX note'). All 11 agents responded with 'Understood, I'm ready' acknowledgements. This is a QUALITY concern for that specific prompt.
pipeline_quality_observations.files_generated: 3 C++ files from earlier session (AS_PlayerCharacter.h, HealthComponent.h, HealthComponent.cpp). New combat system files pending Execute
